name: journal
description: BuJo-style journaling across three Carroll-attested cadences (daily / weekly / monthly). Each cadence has its own skill — daily-log, weekly-log, monthly-log — sharing the four-signifier vocabulary (note dash, action dot, event circle, mood equals) and dot-state-marker transformations (✕ complete / → migrated / » exported / ~~•~~ dropped). Coaching mode walks Carroll's reflection ritual at the corresponding cadence; the daily AM ritual reads the current week's action plan and the current month's 4 priorities as zoom-out context. Capture-layer only — manual migration per BuJo discipline.
